articles.title: Seeing like an agent: how we design tools in Claude Code
articles.description: Building Claude Code: How Anthropic designs and refines AI agent tools like AskUserQuestion and Task tool. The key is progressive disclosure and learning to "see like an agent" to maximize effectiveness.

articles.title: Multi-agent coordination patterns: Five approaches and when to use them
articles.description: Five multi-agent coordination patterns, their trade-offs, and when to evolve from one to another.

articles.title: The advisor strategy: Give agents an intelligence boost
articles.description: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor, and get Opus-level intelligence in your agents at a fraction of the cost.

articles.title: Making Claude Cowork ready for enterprise
articles.description: Claude Cowork is now generally available on all paid plans. Within companies, Claude Cowork has become a key part of how teams operate: handling tasks, drafting project deliverables, and keeping teams up to date.

articles.title: Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster
articles.description: Introducing Claude Managed Agents, a suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale.

articles.description: How Carta Healthcare used Claude and context engineering to build Lighthouse, a clinical abstraction platform reaching 99% accuracy across 22,000 cases a year.

articles.title: Harnessing Claude’s intelligence
articles.description: Three patterns for building on the Claude Platform that keep pace with Claude's evolving intelligence while balancing latency and cost.

articles.description: The Compliance API gives admins programmatic access to audit logs across their Claude Platform organization.

articles.title: Auto mode for Claude Code
articles.description: Auto mode lets Claude Code make permission decisions with built-in safeguards — fewer interruptions than default, less risk than skipping permissions.

articles.description: Claude now opens your apps, navigates your browser, and runs your dev tools to complete tasks. Assign from your phone with Dispatch. Research preview on macOS.

articles.title: 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
articles.description: Standard pricing now applies across the full 1M window for both models, with no long-context premium. Media limits expand to 600 images or PDF pages.

articles.title: Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
articles.description: Ask Claude to explain a concept or analyze your data, and it can respond with interactive charts, diagrams, and visualizations — rendered inline as part of the conversation.

articles.description: Claude for Excel and PowerPoint now share full context across open files, and skills make any workflow instantly repeatable.

articles.description: Claude Code now dispatches a team of agents on every PR to catch bugs that skims miss. Available in research preview for Team and Enterprise.

articles.title: How AI helps break the cost barrier to COBOL modernization
articles.description: The economics of COBOL modernization have shifted. AI makes the economics work by automating what used to require armies of consultants.

articles.title: Increase web search accuracy and efficiency with dynamic filtering
articles.description: Claude's web search and web fetch tools now use code execution to dynamically filter results before they reach the context window. Benchmarks show accuracy gains averaging 11% while using 24% fewer input tokens. Available now on the API.
